Sprint Plan — Feb 21-22

Today (Saturday) — Functionality + Tooling

Today (cont.) — MCP & Plugin Polish

  • Plugin polish — hooks, commands, agent templates up to date

  • Plugin update + reinstall after any changes

Tomorrow (Sunday) — Content Pipeline

  • Content scheduling & distribution automation

  • First real content pieces through the pipeline
